message:
fix(codegen): Handle early returns in init methods before __self is declared

For Python metaclass __init__ methods that have early returns before the
instance is constructed, the previous code tried to return __self which
wasn't declared yet. Now checks if __self is declared and returns a
default-initialized struct for early returns instead.

Example: ParserTesterMetaclass.__init__ returns early when name == 'ParserTestCase'
